title: Lygisma inflexum
taxonomy: Lygisma inflexum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apcynaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Australia, specifically in the Northern Territory. The classification of Lygisma inflexum is further divided into the genus Lygisma, which is a group of flowering plants known for their distinctive trumpet-shaped flowers. The species is also known to be part of the subfamily Rauvoloideae, which includes a variety of tropical plants. Lygisma inflexum is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Apcynaceae family.
